---
title: "CV"
toc: false
---

::: {.cv-header}

## Oliver Brose

Data scientist working on causal inference, A/B testing, and marketing measurement.

[Download CV (PDF)](cv.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}

:::

---

<!--
The downloadable cv.pdf lives at the repo root and is generated from the
LaTeX templates in the content repo (UnbiasedEstimation/content) under
the cv/ folder. To refresh the PDF:

  1. Edit YAML content in UnbiasedEstimation/content/cv/content/*.yaml
  2. Generate the .tex via the AI-assisted workflow described in
     UnbiasedEstimation/content/cv/README.md
  3. Compile to PDF with pdflatex
  4. Copy the resulting PDF here as cv.pdf and commit it

Future improvement: automate via CI (render LaTeX → PDF → commit on build).
-->

## Summary

A short summary paragraph — replace with your own bio. Background, current role, key interests.

## Experience

- **Role · Company · Years** — One-line description.
- **Role · Company · Years** — One-line description.

## Education

- **Degree · Institution · Year** — Brief detail.

## Selected publications

See the [Papers](papers.qmd) page for the full list. Highlights:

- Title of paper 1 — short description.
- Title of paper 2 — short description.

## Contact

- GitHub: [UnbiasedEstimation](https://github.com/UnbiasedEstimation)
- LinkedIn: [oliver-brose](https://www.linkedin.com/in/oliver-brose/)
